payload.title: Overflow menu: collapse refresh + Overview + New Project
payload.description:
Move the three infrequent right-side controls behind a single `⋯` button:

  ⋯  →  ↻ Refresh now
        ☰ Project overview
        ＋ New project

Result: the right side of the bar is just `● ⋯ [＋ New ticket]`.

Notes:
- Live indicator (●) stays on the bar — it's status, not a control.
- "+ Ticket" is the only primary CTA and the only `+` glyph on the bar.
- Menu is a simple dropdown anchored to the `⋯` button. Same close behavior as the popovers (outside-click + Escape).
- Each item keeps its existing handler (`#refresh-now`, `#show-overview`, `#new-project` click listeners) — wire them through the menu rather than directly.

Touches: index.html, app.js (bindOverflowMenu), style.css (menu styles, shared with popover surfaces).
